name: LIME Studios ( Podcast Studio | Photography/Video Studio available for rent )

reviews.text: I recently visited Lime Studio in Pune and had an amazing experience! The space is well-designed, clean, and has a creative vibe. The staff was friendly and professional, making me feel comfortable throughout the session. The equipment is top-notch, and they offer a variety of services that cater to different needs. I would highly recommend this studio to anyone looking for a quality experience in Pune
